title: Medical Imaging
description: The Imaging module integrates DICOM medical imaging with OMOP CDM. Browse imaging studies, view DICOM images with Cornerstone3D clinical tools, extract AI/NLP features, define imaging-based cohort criteria, and analyze imaging patterns across patient populations.
tips: The Studies tab lists all DICOM imaging studies. Filter by source or modality, and click a study to open the DICOM viewer with windowing, zoom, pan, and measurement tools.
Import DICOM files via local upload (.dcm or ZIP) or connect to a DICOMweb-compatible PACS server.
The AI Features tab shows extracted imaging features (NLP Findings, AI Classifications, Radiomics, Manual annotations) with confidence scores and OMOP concept mappings.
Use the Imaging Criteria tab to define reusable cohort criteria based on modality, anatomy, quantitative measures, AI classifications, or radiation dose thresholds.
The Population Analytics tab provides aggregate analysis by modality distribution, body part coverage, and top AI/NLP features across your imaging data.
Imaging studies are linked to OMOP procedure_occurrence records, enabling cohort-level imaging analysis alongside clinical data.
